x-enumeration-literals.name: FunctionalRiskCheck
x-enumeration-literals.description: Test to ensure the system meets functional requirements (including compliance and usability)

x-enumeration-literals.name: ProductionRiskCheck
x-enumeration-literals.description: Test to ensure the system meets production risk requirements - managing exposure to procedural failures

x-enumeration-literals.name: BusinessRiskCheck
x-enumeration-literals.description: Test to ensure the system meets business risk requirements - managing exposure to commercial/business misuse

x-enumeration-literals.name: OperationalRiskCheck
x-enumeration-literals.description: Test to ensure the system meets operational risk requirements - managing exposure to operational and platform/systems failures
